17.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve Review: The Presta Valve Killer? - Bikerumor
17.evidenceText: Schwalbe introduced Clik Valves in July of 2024, presenting a novel new design with the goal of creating a new standard and replacing the
17.extractionRationale: The provided evidence does not contain any information about bicycle brands or models with pre-installed Clik valves, nor does it mention OEM adoption for model years 2026 or 2027. No specific count can be extracted from the available source material.

37.sourceTitle: CoreCap Valve Cap Set - BBB Cycling
37.evidenceText: The BBB Cycling CoreCap Valve Cap Set is essential for every cyclist: Extra caps for your CoreCap valve, providing up to 300% better airflow.
37.extractionRationale: The source does not contain specific information about the number of distinct replacement/spare part SKUs (valve cores, seals, o-rings, replacement kits) available for the CoreCap valve system. Only a valve cap set is mentioned without a count of SKUs.

41.evidenceText: The new valve is meant to address the main complaints that riders have about the current prevailing valve designs, promising increased durability, better air
41.extractionRationale: No specific brand adoption data for 2026 or 2027 continuation data is provided in the available source. The article only introduces the Clik valve concept but contains no information about which brands adopted it in 2026 or their status in 2027. 2027 specifications are not yet available.

45.evidenceText: DT Swiss uses proprietary "DT Swiss tubeless valve" that "perfectly matches DT Swiss rims" - no mention of Clik valve adoption in their 2026-2027 product lines
45.extractionRationale: The evidence shows DT Swiss continues to use their own proprietary tubeless valve system, not Clik valves. No information is provided about Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, or Roval adopting Clik. Therefore, 0% of major brands have adopted Clik as standard.

57.evidenceText: Sources show mixed inventory: BTI-166 has "5 in stock now", while BTI-165 variants are "Currently out of stock" with message "working hard to make the product available again" but no specific restock dates provided to calculate turnaround time.
57.extractionRationale: No specific 'back in stock' dates are mentioned in the evidence that would allow calculation of restock turnaround time. While some variants are in stock and others are out with no specific return date, the lack of dated stock transitions prevents determining a B2B restock turnaround metric.
